title: [regression] SB_LUT4 mistakenly optimized away
body:
I made a simple ring oscillator for iCE40 consisting of SB_LUT4 inverters. After 7129a03083b21c1ed1610126ae28828c56f42369, the SB_LUT4 are optimized away.

To reproduce the issue, the source code with a makefile are available [here](https://gist.github.com/DurandA/8d51cc4e8cf046677284afc9d99352bf). This is a simplified version of @cliffordwolf's [_ringosc.v_](http://svn.clifford.at/handicraft/2015/ringosc/ringosc.v) (for some reason, [_floorplan.v_ oscillator example](https://github.com/YosysHQ/nextpnr/blob/master/ice40/examples/floorplan/floorplan.v) from NextPNR does not oscillate).

Here is a partial diff of the Yosys output:

```diff
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 {
-  "creator": "Yosys 0.8+592 (git sha1 44fd459, clang 3.8.0-2ubuntu4 -fPIC -Os)",
+  "creator": "Yosys 0.8+601 (git sha1 7129a03, clang 3.8.0-2ubuntu4 -fPIC -Os)",
   "modules": {
     "ICESTORM_LC": {
       "attributes": {
@@ -7339,165 +7339,15 @@
             "Q": [ 2 ]
           }
         },
-        "buffers[0]": {
-          "hide_name": 0,
-          "type": "SB_LUT4",
-          "parameters": {
-            "LUT_INIT": 1
-          },
-          "attributes": {
-            "module_not_derived": 1,
-            "src": "top.v:9"
-          },
-          "port_directions": {
-            "I0": "input",
-            "I1": "input",
-            "I2": "input",
-            "I3": "input",
-            "O": "output"
-          },
-          "connections": {
-            "I0": [ 72 ],
-            "I1": [ "0" ],
-            "I2": [ "0" ],
-            "I3": [ "0" ],
-            "O": [ 73 ]
-          }
-        },

+            "LUT_INIT": 85

             "module_not_derived": 1,
```
